quiz_items.question: What information must be included in user information (manual) for laser products? (Select all that apply)
options: Instructions for operation and maintenance with warnings
quiz_items.explanation: User information must include: operation/maintenance instructions with warnings, radiation specifications, label reproductions, controls listing, and caution statement about hazardous exposure if instructions not followed.

quiz_items.question: A manufacturer produces multi-axis robotic laser workstations. Which Laser Notice provides specific guidance for these products?
quiz_items.explanation: Laser Notice #39 addresses multi-axis, robotic, high-power laser workstations not Class I due to need to accommodate all sizes of workpieces. It discusses hazards and information required in user manuals.
